title: Colored Name Tags
description: 🎨 Enhance your name tags with vibrant colors !
body:
# Colored Name Tags

You can now color your name tags, just as easily as dying leather armor, craft a name tag with dyes, right-click on an entity and enjoy your new colorful names ! ## Features: > **Infinite possibilities !** Craft the name tag with as many dyes as you want to get the perfect color.

> Colored name tags with or without a name will set the entity name to the name tag color, even if it already has a custom name.

> Name tags without a color can be used to reset the name color.
